Sequential.Name: update_departments_many[0]
Sequential.SQL: WITH mutation_result AS (UPDATE "public"."departments" SET "description" = $1::text WHERE departments."name" = $2::text RETURNING *) SELECT json_build_object('affected_rows', (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM mutation_result))
